CreateDevicePool.description: Grants permission to create a device pool within a project

CreateInstanceProfile.description: Grants permission to create a device instance profile

CreateNetworkProfile.description: Grants permission to create a network profile within a project

CreateProject.description: Grants permission to create a project for mobile testing

CreateRemoteAccessSession.description: Grants permission to start a remote access session to a device instance

CreateTestGridProject.description: Grants permission to create a project for desktop testing

CreateTestGridUrl.description: Grants permission to generate a new pre-signed url used to access our test grid service

CreateUpload.description: Grants permission to upload a new file or app within a project

CreateVPCEConfiguration.description: Grants permission to create an Amazon Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) endpoint configuration

DeleteDevicePool.description: Grants permission to delete a user-generated device pool

DeleteInstanceProfile.description: Grants permission to delete a user-generated instance profile

DeleteNetworkProfile.description: Grants permission to delete a user-generated network profile

DeleteProject.description: Grants permission to delete a mobile testing project

DeleteRemoteAccessSession.description: Grants permission to delete a completed remote access session and its results

DeleteRun.description: Grants permission to delete a run

DeleteTestGridProject.description: Grants permission to delete a desktop testing project

DeleteUpload.description: Grants permission to delete a user-uploaded file

DeleteVPCEConfiguration.description: Grants permission to delete an Amazon Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) endpoint configuration

GetAccountSettings.description: Grants permission to retrieve the number of unmetered iOS and/or unmetered Android devices purchased by the account

GetDevice.description: Grants permission to retrieve the information of a unique device type

GetDeviceInstance.description: Grants permission to retireve the information of a device instance

GetDevicePool.description: Grants permission to retireve the information of a device pool

GetDevicePoolCompatibility.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about the compatibility of a test and/or app with a device pool

GetInstanceProfile.description: Grants permission to retireve the information of an instance profile

GetJob.description: Grants permission to retireve the information of a job

GetNetworkProfile.description: Grants permission to retireve the information of a network profile

GetOfferingStatus.description: Grants permission to retrieve the current status and future status of all offerings purchased by an AWS account

GetProject.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about a mobile testing project

GetRemoteAccessSession.description: Grants permission to retireve the link to a currently running remote access session

GetRun.description: Grants permission to retireve the information of a run

GetSuite.description: Grants permission to retireve the information of a testing suite

GetTest.description: Grants permission to retireve the information of a test case

GetTestGridProject.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about a desktop testing project

GetTestGridSession.description: Grants permission to retireve the information of a test grid session

GetUpload.description: Grants permission to retireve the information of an uploaded file

GetVPCEConfiguration.description: Grants permission to retireve the information of an Amazon Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) endpoint configuration

InstallToRemoteAccessSession.description: Grants permission to install an application to a device in a remote access session

ListArtifacts.description: Grants permission to list the artifacts in a project

ListDeviceInstances.description: Grants permission to list the information of device instances

ListDevicePools.description: Grants permission to list the information of device pools

ListDevices.description: Grants permission to list the information of unique device types

ListInstanceProfiles.description: Grants permission to list the information of device instance profiles

ListJobs.description: Grants permission to list the information of jobs within a run

ListNetworkProfiles.description: Grants permission to list the information of network profiles within a project

ListOfferingPromotions.description: Grants permission to list the offering promotions

ListOfferingTransactions.description: Grants permission to list all of the historical purchases, renewals, and system renewal transactions for an AWS account

ListOfferings.description: Grants permission to list the products or offerings that the user can manage through the API

ListProjects.description: Grants permission to list the information of mobile testing projects for an AWS account

ListRemoteAccessSessions.description: Grants permission to list the information of currently running remote access sessions

ListRuns.description: Grants permission to list the information of runs within a project

ListSamples.description: Grants permission to list the information of samples within a project

ListSuites.description: Grants permission to list the information of testing suites within a job

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list the tags of a resource

ListTestGridProjects.description: Grants permission to list the information of desktop testing projects for an AWS account

ListTestGridSessionActions.description: Grants permission to list the session actions performed during a test grid session

ListTestGridSessionArtifacts.description: Grants permission to list the artifacts generated by a test grid session

ListTestGridSessions.description: Grants permission to list the sessions within a test grid project

ListTests.description: Grants permission to list the information of tests within a testing suite

ListUniqueProblems.description: Grants permission to list the information of unique problems within a run

ListUploads.description: Grants permission to list the information of uploads within a project

ListVPCEConfigurations.description: Grants permission to list the information of Amazon Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) endpoint configurations

PurchaseOffering.description: Grants permission to purchase offerings for an AWS account

RenewOffering.description: Grants permission to set the quantity of devices to renew for an offering

ScheduleRun.description: Grants permission to schedule a run

StopJob.description: Grants permission to terminate a running job

StopRemoteAccessSession.description: Grants permission to terminate a running remote access session

StopRun.description: Grants permission to terminate a running test run

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add tags to a resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags from a resource

UpdateDeviceInstance.description: Grants permission to modify an existing device instance

UpdateDevicePool.description: Grants permission to modify an existing device pool

UpdateInstanceProfile.description: Grants permission to modify an existing instance profile

UpdateNetworkProfile.description: Grants permission to modify an existing network profile

UpdateProject.description: Grants permission to modify an existing mobile testing project

UpdateTestGridProject.description: Grants permission to modify an existing desktop testing project

UpdateUpload.description: Grants permission to modify an existing upload

UpdateVPCEConfiguration.description: Grants permission to modify an existing Amazon Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) endpoint configuration

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters actions based on the allowed set of values for each of the tags

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters actions based on tag-value assoicated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters actions based on the presence of mandatory tags in the request
